contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Needs more heat than most chilies — south-facing windowsill only. Slow to fruit indoors.

notes: Fruity, intense heat. Capsicum chinense species needs more warmth than annuum varieties. Slower to fruit indoors. Can be overwintered and becomes a small perennial tree over years. Scoville 100,000–350,000.
